name: EmuCoreX
desc: PlayStation 2 emulator for Android with a PCSX2-based core adapted by EmuCoreX, a modern game library, live overlay controls, and a handheld-focused experience.
descFull: PlayStation 2 emulator for Android with a PCSX2-based core adapted by EmuCoreX, a modern game library, live overlay controls, and a handheld-focused experience.
